original_text: ### [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked. **Layout (explicit):** - **Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images. - **Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line. - **Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px. **Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor. The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical. **Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped. Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals. ## MJML ```xml Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯ ``` If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

relations.note: Describes the rare fallback path when the section's background image cannot render.
Reuses the mandated Sunshine fallback color when the background image itself is omitted.
Confirms the signature button radius persists even in the no-background fallback.

rules.intent: Lock the structural composition of the Gradient Callout CTA banner so headline and button placement never drift.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA section is a full-width banner: a centered headline sits in the top third over the branded orange/yellow gradient image (Brand Blue #00529b, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line), and a single centered button sits lower-middle below it (Deep Blue #003D74 fill, white 18px label, Gold #FFC20E arrow ›, 248×64px), both stacked and horizontally centered on the gradient background.

rules.intent: Protect the branded gradient asset from alteration and guarantee a safe visual fallback across email clients.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout background must use the exact branded gradient asset (Gradient_callout.png) applied as the section background sized cover/no-repeat/centered at the 600px canvas width, without re-hosting or recoloring it; a solid Sunshine (#faa31b) background-color fallback is always required alongside it because clients like Outlook drop background images.

quotes: `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape

Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

rules.intent: Preserve the button's signature asymmetric silhouette as an immutable brand device.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA button must always use its signature four-value asymmetric radius (49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px) on every instance, even when the background image is skipped; never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

quotes: keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above

The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical.
even when the background is skipped

If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Ensure the CTA banner degrades gracefully without losing its color identity or signature button shape when images can't render.
rules.rule_text: In the very rare case the background image must be skipped (plain-text/AMP fallback, an image-stripping client, or a hard size budget), remove only background-url, background-size, background-repeat, and background-position — keep the solid Sunshine (#faa31b) background-color, the headline color, the button fill, and the signature button radius exactly as specified; every other rule stays identical.
